title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
